title: SONOS Roam 2 Portable Wireless Multi-room Speaker with Amazon Alexa - Black

crossSellProducts.title: SANDSTROM Black Series S3HDM115 High Speed HDMI Cable with Ethernet - 3 m

offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

description.main: Wherever your adventures take you, this Sonos Roam 2 will provide the soundtrack. It's precision-engineered drivers kick out crystal clear sound with a low end that would make speakers twice the size green with envy. Better still, Automatic Trueplay fine tunes the sound based on your surroundings so it'll always sound its best. Even the best adventures have a few bumps in the road. Fortunately, it's built like a tank and the IP67 rating means it's not afraid of a little rain or dust. And with up to 10 hours of playback on a single charge, you won't be constantly looking for the next plug socket on your travels.
goodToKnow: It's got Amazon Alexa built in so you can use it to control your smart home set up
Download the Sonos app and browse tons of music, audiobooks and radio stations
Hands full? Sonos Voice Control lets you skip tracks or crank the volume using just your voice
Connect it to another compatible speaker (sold separately) for a wide stereo sound
Enjoy fast wireless charging by dropping it on a Qi charger or the custom-designed Sonos Roam 2 charger (both sold separately)
